name: Command Center
description: HUD/radar visual language. Monochromatic cyan, beveled frames, scanlines, status bars. All standard Decantr components work — this recipe describes how to COMPOSE them differently for the Command Center aesthetic.

decorators.cc-frame: Beveled octagonal border frame. Apply to containers, panels, and section wrappers.
decorators.cc-frame-sm: Smaller bevel variant for Cards and compact panels.
decorators.cc-corner: Corner bracket decorations (top-left + bottom-right). Apply to section containers.
decorators.cc-scanline: Subtle horizontal scanline overlay. Apply to data-heavy areas and backgrounds.
decorators.cc-grid: Faint grid-line pattern background. Apply to page backgrounds and large containers.
decorators.cc-bar: Status bar row — flex, uppercase, tracked, border-bottom. Use as panel headers.
decorators.cc-bar-bottom: Status bar variant with border-top instead. Use as panel footers.
decorators.cc-blink: Slow 2s pulse animation for status indicators and dots.
decorators.cc-glow: Cyan glow shadow effect. Apply to important/active elements.
decorators.cc-glow-strong: Stronger glow variant for hero KPIs and primary actions.
decorators.cc-glow-pulse: Animated glow pulse (3s loop). Use sparingly for critical status.
decorators.cc-label: Uppercase micro label with wide letter-spacing.
decorators.cc-data: Monospace tabular-nums readout styling for data values.
decorators.cc-mesh: Subtle radial gradient background for page-level containers.

panel.description: Standard HUD panel. Beveled frame with status bar header.

card.description: Command Center card. Standard Card wrapped in cc-frame with status bar header.

kpi.description: KPI metric display with HUD frame and glow.

table.description: Data table in HUD frame with scanline overlay and live status bar.

form.description: Form inputs in Command Center style. Standard components with cc-frame wrapper.

sidebar.description: Navigation sidebar with HUD frame and grid background.

layout.description: Full page Command Center layout. CSS grid with sidebar + main content area.

modal.description: Modal dialog with HUD frame. Apply cc-frame to content panel via class.

chart.description: Chart area with HUD frame and scanline overlay.
